text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A huge crowd gathers at the Japan Cup, Mayano
Top Gun among them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian races the Emperor in her mind
countless times... yet is unable to see an outcome
where she defeats her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that doesn't mean she can't do it. Her heart
races in anticipation.
